import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AtomEncoder(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, emb_dim):
        super().__init__()
        self.atom_embedding_list = nn.ModuleList([
            nn.Embedding(120, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(10, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(10, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(15, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(10, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(10, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(10, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(2, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(2, emb_dim),
        ])

    def forward(self, x):
        out = 0
        for i, emb in enumerate(self.atom_embedding_list):
            out += emb(x[:, i])
        return out

class BondEncoder(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, emb_dim):
        super().__init__()
        self.bond_embedding_list = nn.ModuleList([
            nn.Embedding(10, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(10, emb_dim),
            nn.Embedding(2, emb_dim),
        ])

    def forward(self, edge_attr):
        out = 0
        for i, emb in enumerate(self.bond_embedding_list):
            out += emb(edge_attr[:, i])
        return out

class MPNNLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, hidden_dim, dropout=0.0):
        super().__init__()
        self.mlp_msg = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
        )
        self.mlp_upd = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
        )
        self.bn = nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim)
        self.dropout = dropout

    def forward(self, x, edge_index, edge_attr):
        src, dst = edge_index[0], edge_index[1]
        msg = x[src] + edge_attr
        msg = self.mlp_msg(msg)
        aggr = torch.zeros_like(x)
        aggr.index_add_(0, dst, msg)
        x = x + aggr
        x = self.mlp_upd(x)
        x = self.bn(x)
        x = F.relu(x)
        x = F.dropout(x, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)
        return x

class GNN(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, hidden_dim, num_layers, dropout=0.0):
        super().__init__()
        self.layers = nn.ModuleList([MPNNLayer(hidden_dim, dropout) for _ in range(num_layers)])

    def forward(self, x, edge_index, edge_attr):
        for layer in self.layers:
            x = layer(x, edge_index, edge_attr)
        return x

def global_mean_pool(x, batch):
    num_graphs = int(batch.max().item()) + 1
    out = torch.zeros(num_graphs, x.size(1), device=x.device, dtype=x.dtype)
    out.index_add_(0, batch, x)
    counts = torch.zeros(num_graphs, device=x.device, dtype=x.dtype)
    counts.index_add_(0, batch, torch.ones(batch.size(0), device=x.device, dtype=x.dtype))
    out = out / counts.clamp(min=1).unsqueeze(1)
    return out

class MolClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, hidden_dim=300, num_layers=5, num_tasks=128, dropout=0.0):
        super().__init__()
        self.atom_encoder = AtomEncoder(hidden_dim)
        self.bond_encoder = BondEncoder(hidden_dim)
        self.gnn = GNN(hidden_dim, num_layers, dropout)
        self.head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_tasks)
        )

    def forward(self, x, edge_index, edge_attr, batch):
        x = self.atom_encoder(x)
        edge_attr = self.bond_encoder(edge_attr)
        x = self.gnn(x, edge_index, edge_attr)
        x = global_mean_pool(x, batch)
        x = self.head(x)
        return x
